title: Vita Embryo — AI Embryo Assessment
blurb: Led AI diagnostic R&D for embryo assessment (Vita Embryo) to MFDS (Korean FDA) clinical-trial approval, and rebuilt the product lifecycle to cut release cycles from ~2 months to 2–3 weeks.

title: AR / HCI research at SNU & CMU
blurb: A decade of human-computer interaction and augmented-reality research — IoT-device interaction in AR, 3D interaction techniques, and mobile sensing — published at ACM and IEEE venues including UIST and CHI. The technical foundation behind the products above.
